{{RISK_SECTION_TITLE}}

                    
    
                        
                        
  • Kelly Fraction (α)0.25 — fractional only
    • 
                        
  • Max Position Size≤ 10% capital
    • 
                        
  • Daily Loss Limit−$2,000 hard stop
    • 
                        
  • Drawdown Circuit-Breaker> 8% → auto-halt
    • 
                        
  • Min Orderbook Liquidity$10,000 depth
    • 
                        
  • Signal DeduplicationActive
    • 
                        
  • Kill SwitchTelegram-accessible
    •
